Anthropic design references

A portable, searchable library built from the supplied Figma page exports, chip palette, and named Anthropic UI glyphs. Copy individual values or build multi-SVG bundles.

0Figma colors
0UI patterns
0chip recipes
0SVG variants

Library overview

Everything needed for quick reference is embedded in this file. No network request, install, or framework is required.

Figma colors

Browse all 37 semantic variables in the source page’s eight-family order, with light/dark tokens and separately preserved preview discrepancies.

--color-background-primary: #fff;

Component patterns

Use verified desktop, mobile, chat, app, form, navigation, and promotional-detail rules with copyable CSS.

radius · spacing · surfaces · actions

Chip recipes

Browse all 75 observed and derived prose-chip combinations with resolved text, fill, border, radius, and CSS.

color / background / border / radius

Glyphs & icons

Search both desktop and mobile Anthropic icon sets. Select any combination and copy a clean SVG bundle.

desktop:copy · mobile:artifacts

Copy formats

Every page exposes formats that fit the asset: light/dark variables for colors, reusable CSS for components and chips, and raw SVG or inline HTML for icons.

Figma color system

The authoritative 37-variable Claude color page, in its original eight-family order. Swatches use exported Figma preview fills; copy actions use the printed token values.

Component patterns

Reusable geometry, spacing, radii, surfaces, and action placement verified against the Claude Components and Desktop exports.

Chip tokens

Observed Claude prose/code styles plus semantic, CDS palette, and color-mix derivatives.

Glyphs & icons

Each name maps directly to the embedded JSON source. Select cards to build a multi-SVG clipboard bundle.

Using copied assets

Inline SVG

Paste raw SVG directly into HTML or a design/code prompt. It scales without rasterization and can inherit the surrounding color.

CSS chip

Use the copied class as-is, or take only the resolved values. The file keeps resolved hex colors for maximum offline consistency.

Color values

Copy the printed Figma light or dark token, the exported preview fill when it differs, or a complete theme-aware CSS pair.

Offline clipboard

The file tries the modern Clipboard API first, then uses a hidden-textarea fallback for local files opened directly in Chrome.

Source coverage

Colors, Claude Components, Desktop, and Mobile exports are complete. Promotional Examples is complete; its separate Components export was truncated in the uploaded archive and is not represented as complete.
